findings.message: State "schedule" is unreachable from entry "search". It was designed but no user can ever arrive there.
findings.fix: Add a transition leading to "schedule" or remove it.

findings.message: Screen "SearchScreen" contract looks happy-path-only. Missing baseline states: loading, empty, error.*.
findings.fix: Add loading, empty, error.* to requiredStates, or declare an exemption with a written reason if a state genuinely cannot apply.

findings.message: "Button.Icon" on "SearchScreen" has a 36px target — below the ios minimum (iOS HIG 44pt).
findings.fix: Increase the target (including padding/hit-slop) to at least 44px on ios.

findings.message: "Button.Icon" on "SearchScreen" has a 36px target — below the android minimum (Material 48dp).
findings.fix: Increase the target (including padding/hit-slop) to at least 48px on android.

findings.message: Label "Use my current location" (search.locate) is 23 chars; at ×1.4 localization expansion it projects to 33, over the layout budget of 20. German will break this.
findings.fix: Shorten the English source, or widen the layout budget to ≥ 33 chars.
